    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values

    P

    playBGM(String) - Static method in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Starts looping background music from resource path.
    player - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Controlled player instance.
    Player - Class in logic.gameLogic
    Runtime player container that binds character data with scene nodes.
    Player(Character, int) - Constructor for class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Creates a player model and scene nodes.
    Player_1_Character - Static variable in class logic.gameLogic.Selection
    Selected character for player 1.
    PLAYER_1_SELECTING_TEXT - Static variable in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Default text shown while player 1 has not locked a character.
    Player_2_Character - Static variable in class logic.gameLogic.Selection
    Selected character for player 2.
    PLAYER_2_SELECTING_TEXT - Static variable in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Default text shown while player 2 has not locked a character.
    player1 - Variable in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Text node displaying player 1 selection status.
    player1 - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Player model for the left side.
    PLAYER1_SELECT - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.SelectState
    Waiting for player 1 to pick a character.
    player1HealthBar - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Health bar for player 1.
    player1PreviewImage - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Large image preview for player 1 selection.
    player1SkillBar - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Skill cooldown bar for player 1.
    player2 - Variable in class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Text node displaying player 2 selection status.
    player2 - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Player model for the right side.
    PLAYER2_SELECT - Enum constant in enum class logic.gameLogic.SelectState
    Waiting for player 2 to pick a character.
    player2HealthBar - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Health bar for player 2.
    player2PreviewImage - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Large image preview for player 2 selection.
    player2SkillBar - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Skill cooldown bar for player 2.
    PlayerLogic - Class in logic.gameLogic
    Runtime controller for a single player.
    PlayerLogic(Player, Player, int) - Constructor for class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Creates a controller for one player and sets up default key bindings and UI helpers.
    playerLogic1 - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Input/combat logic for player 1.
    playerLogic2 - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Input/combat logic for player 2.
    playerNum - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.PlayerLogic
    Player slot number used to select key bindings.
    playerRoot - Variable in class logic.gameLogic.Player
    Root node grouping sprite and hitbox for movement transforms.
    playerSelection - Variable in class component.scene1.CharacterSelectScene
    Top status bar that displays current player selections.
    PlayerSelection - Class in component.scene1
    Top status bar used in scene 1 to display each player's current selection state.
    PlayerSelection() - Constructor for class component.scene1.PlayerSelection
    Creates the player selection status bar and configures layout/styling.
    PlayerState - Enum Class in logic.gameLogic
    High-level player state used by movement/combat animation logic.
    PlayerState() - Constructor for enum class logic.gameLogic.PlayerState
     
    playPrioritySFX(String) - Static method in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Plays a priority sound effect and pauses BGM until it finishes.
    playRandomBubblePop() - Static method in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Plays a random bubble-pop sound from the configured pool.
    playSFX(String) - Static method in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Plays a one-shot sound effect at configured SFX volume.
    priorityPlayer - Static variable in class logic.audio.AudioManager
    Player used for priority SFX that should temporarily override BGM.
    projectileList - Variable in class component.scene2.Scene2
    Active projectiles currently simulated in the arena.
    Pyro - Class in logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters
    Pyro melee character with very fast single-frame strike timing.
    Pyro() - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Pyro
    Creates Pyro with default tuned stats and animation setup.
    Pyro(int, int, int, int, float) - Constructor for class logic.entity.characters.meleeCharacters.Pyro
    Creates Pyro with custom stats.
